/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/JozetPluginplugin.dir/link.d  -o Jozet/System/libJozetPluginplugin.so CMakeFiles/JozetPluginplugin.dir/JozetPluginplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JozetPluginplugin.dir/JozetPluginplugin_Jozet_SystemPlugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pruebas/jozet-dotfiles/backend/build libJozetPlugin.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
